/usr/bin/c++   -O3 -Wall -Wno-deprecated-register -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-return-type -std=c++14  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/connectionTest.dir/tests/closedLoopTest/connectionTest.cpp.o  -o connectionTest   -L/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/hdf5-1.12.0/lib  -L/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/armadillo-6.500.4/lib  -L/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/yaml-cpp/lib  -L/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/fftw-3.3.4/lib  -L/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/Faddeeva/lib  -L/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/zeromq-4.1.4/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/hdf5-1.12.0/lib:/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/armadillo-6.500.4/lib:/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/yaml-cpp/lib:/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/fftw-3.3.4/lib:/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/Faddeeva/lib:/lhome/nicholas/software/PlatoSim3/dependencies/Installs/zeromq-4.1.4/lib -lzmq -lpthread
